title: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections

'''''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections''''' is the fourth installment of the ''[[Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' series of reference books published by [[Dorling Kindersley]] on [[April 2]], [[2005]]. Written by [[Curtis Saxton]] and illustrated by [[Hans Jenssen]] and [[Richard Chasemore]], the book provides in-depth cross-sections and illustrations of over a dozen [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and vehicles from the film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. The book's content was later republished in [[2007]] as part of ''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]'', a compilation of the entire Cross-Sections series.

==Contents==
*[[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]
*[[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 Fighter]]
*[[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Jedi Interceptor]]
*[[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|Tri-Fighter]]
*[[HMP droid gunship/Legends|Droid Gunship]]
*Separatist Ships
*[[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']]
*[[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|Juggernaut]]
*[[Utapau/Legends|Utapaun]] [[Porax-38 starfighter|P-38 Fighter]]
*Grievous's Wheel Bike
*[[Oevvaor jet catamaran/Legends|Wookiee Catamaran]]
*[[Theta-class T-2c shuttle/Legends|Palpatine's Shuttle]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] [[Escape pod/Legends|Escape Pod]]

==Continuity==
Because the hard details of the set of [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] [[J-type star skiff]] for ''Revenge of the Sith'' were not developed until late in production of the film, they could not be included in the ''Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections''[http://www.starwars.com/hyperspace/member/episode-iii/bts/setdiary/news20040824.html].
